OFFICIALS NOTE THAT THE GROWING ADOPTION OF STABLECOINS INCREASES GLOBAL DEMAND FOR U.S. TREASURIES AND OTHER DOLLAR ASSETS, FURTHER STRENGTHENING THE DOLLAR'S ROLE IN INTERNATIONAL PAYMENTS AND FINANCE.

WHILE STABLECOINS IMPROVE THE SPEED AND EFFICIENCY OF DIGITAL TRANSACTIONS, CENTRAL BANKS EMPHASIZE THEY STILL RELY ON THE CREDIBILITY AND STABILITY OF EXISTING FIAT CURRENCIES INSTEAD OF OPERATING INDEPENDENTLY.

AS A RESULT, REGULATORS VIEW STABLECOINS AS A COMPLEMENT TO THE CURRENT FINANCIAL SYSTEM RATHER THAN A TRUE ALTERNATIVE TO SOVEREIGN CURRENCIES, WHILE CONTINUING TO DEVELOP REGULATIONS TO MANAGE ASSOCIATED FINANCIAL AND SYSTEMIC RISKS. ...
